nasb.text: Then Menahem struck Tiphsah and all who were in it and its borders from Tirzah, because they did not open to him; therefore he struck it and ripped up all its women who were with child.

esv.text: At that time Menahem sacked Tiphsah and all who were in it and its territory from Tirzah on, because they did not open it to him. Therefore he sacked it, and he ripped open all the women in it who were pregnant.

cnv.text: 那時，米拿現從得撒開始，攻打提斐薩和城中所有的人，以及它的四境；因為他們不給他打開城門，所以他攻擊它，把所有的孕婦剖腹。

ccb.text: 那时，米拿现从得撒起兵攻打提斐萨及其四境。因为城中的居民不肯打开城门投降，他就杀光他们，剖开所有孕妇的肚腹。
